raw_output: {"http_records": [{"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users?q=test&page=1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "List users with search and pagination"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"name\": \"test\", \"email\": \"test@example.com\"}", "notes": "Create new user"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "Get user by ID"}, {"method": "PUT", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080", "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"}, "body": "name=updated", "notes": "Update user name"}, {"method": "DELETE", "url": "http://localhost:8080/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080"}, "notes": "Delete user by ID"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/health", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080"}, "notes": "Health check endpoint"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/items", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "List items"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/admin/stats", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8080", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "Admin stats endpoint"}]}
